creator: jf@dockes.org
text:
Thought I'd provide the references for the other Prs, and a link to the 
patch files for convenience:

ports/152191 [PATCH] databases/xapian-core update to 1.2.3
ports/152192 [PATCH] databases/xapian-bindings update to 1.2.3
ports/152193 [PATCH] databases/p5-Search-Xapian update to 1.2.3
ports/152194 [PATCH] www/xapian-omega update to 1.2.3
ports/152195 [PATCH] deskutils/pinot update to xapian-core 1.2.3

The patch files:
http://www.recoll.org/files/freebsd-xapian123/
